spec_match.rationale: Accurately maps versioned paths, no-query parameters, HTTPS rules, and browser allowlist requirements.

interactive.rationale: Features click-to-fill candidate lists (passing and failing), live check execution, and a savings calculator.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Great historical context details (partitioning history from 2020 to 138).

edge_cases.rationale: Estimated monthly cache hits (~250M) and size calculations scale dynamically depending on candidate inputs.

design_system.rationale: Uses the standard layout conventions and fonts elegantly.

summary: Extremely informative interactive explorer detailing the 5 checklist gates and providing a real estimation multiplier.
